message:
feat(planner): lower BETWEEN WHERE terms into inclusive Range index probes

extract_access_path_probe skipped WhereTermKind::Between when building
physical-plan probes for IndexScanRange/CoveringIndexScan paths.
BETWEEN x AND y now emits AccessPathProbe::Range with both bounds
inclusive, matching SQL semantics. Ref bd-1dp9.6.7.3.4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
